title: Rutin Combats Salmonella infection through virulence suppression and gut barrier maintenance.
snippet: Salmonella Typhimurium (S. Typhimurium) is a major zoonotic pathogen causing severe gastroenteritis and septicemia. Traditional antibiotics targeting bacterial growth face increasing resistance challenges, while the development of novel antimicrobials is slow and costly. Antivirulence therapy, which targets bacterial virulence factors, has emerged as a prom...
